notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Kazuma Okamoto out at 2nd. Andrés Giménez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa singles on a fly ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider hits a ground-rule double (2) on a line drive to left-center field. Myles Straw to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider grounds out to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo pops out to shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Brice Turang steals (6) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo grounds out, pitcher Louis Varland to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Joey Ortiz to 3rd.
